case_title: BRENNEMAN, DON vs. PINO, PETRA et al

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION AND ORDER TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND BY JUDGE QUIDACHAY, DEFENDANTS TO FILE ANSWER W/I FIVE DAYS OF RECEIPT OF THE COURT'S ORDER DEFAULT OF OCT-07-1999 SET ASIDE, JUDGMENT OF OCT-07-1999 SET ASIDE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRENNEMAN, DON SERVED SEP-15-1999, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PINO, PETRA BROOKS, LESLIE E.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PINO, PETRA BROOKS, LESLIE E. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 462 MUNICH STREET, LEASE FORFEITED, -INCLUDES ALL OTHER OCCUPANTS IN POSSESSION
FIRST APPEARANCE FILED BY DEFENDANT PINO, PETRA BROOKS, LESLIE E.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRENNEMAN, DON AS TO DEFENDANT PINO, PETRA BROOKS, LESLIE E. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
PROOF OF SERVICE OF 15-SEP-99 SERVED SEP-15-1999, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $212.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRENNEMAN, DON AS TO DEFENDANT PINO, PETRA BROOKS, LESLIE E.
